label: Purchased Electricity - Grid Mix
description: Purchased grid electricity for facility operations, reported under Scope 2 with location-based and market-based treatment.

fields.label: Electricity Consumption
fields.help_text: Enter purchased electricity consumed during the reporting period.

fields.label: Market-Based Emission Factor
fields.help_text: Optional supplier- or product-specific Scope 2 factor. If provided, this replaces the default market-based factor path.

fields.label: Market-Based Factor Source
fields.help_text: Capture the utility, tariff, product, or document supporting the override factor.

notes: Scope 2 reporting should preserve both location-based and market-based outputs where applicable.

label: Purchased Electricity - Renewable or Carbon-Free Claims
description: Purchased electricity covered by renewable or other low-carbon procurement claims requiring explicit Scope 2 accounting treatment.

fields.label: Electricity Consumption
fields.help_text: Enter electricity covered by renewable or low-carbon procurement.

fields.label: Procurement Instrument
fields.help_text: Capture REC, PPA, tariff, supplier-specific factor, or other contractual instrument details.

fields.label: Market-Based Emission Factor
fields.help_text: Optional supplier- or product-specific Scope 2 factor. If provided, this replaces the default market-based factor path.

fields.label: Market-Based Factor Source
fields.help_text: Capture the utility, tariff, product, or document supporting the override factor.

notes: Do not assume zero emissions solely from the label; contractual evidence and market-based rules must be evaluated.

accounting_metadata.partial_reason: Market-based reporting currently falls back to proxy factors unless a supplier-specific or residual-mix factor is available.

label: Onsite Electricity Generation
description: Electricity generated onsite. This needs explicit treatment based on generation technology rather than a generic electricity factor.

fields.label: Generated Electricity
fields.help_text: Enter electricity generated onsite during the reporting period.

fields.label: Generation Type
fields.help_text: Identify technology so emissions are calculated appropriately.

notes: Onsite generation cannot be modeled safely as generic purchased electricity.

label: Stationary Natural Gas
description: Combustion of natural gas in stationary equipment.

fields.label: Natural Gas Consumption
fields.help_text: Enter stationary natural gas consumption.

fields.label: Emission Factor Override
fields.help_text: Optional fuel carbon-intensity or supplier-specific factor. If provided, this replaces the default combustion factor.

fields.label: Override Factor Source
fields.help_text: Capture the supplier, certificate, utility, or analysis supporting the override factor.

accounting_metadata.partial_reason: Reported diesel may include renewable or biogenic blend share, but this activity currently treats the entered volume as fully fossil.

label: Stationary Diesel
description: Combustion of diesel in stationary equipment.

fields.label: Diesel Consumption
fields.help_text: Enter diesel consumption for stationary equipment.

fields.label: Emission Factor Override
fields.help_text: Optional fuel carbon-intensity or supplier-specific factor. If provided, this replaces the default combustion factor.

fields.label: Override Factor Source
fields.help_text: Capture the supplier, certificate, utility, or analysis supporting the override factor.

notes: Reported diesel may include renewable or biogenic blend share; current calculation treats entered volume as fully fossil unless adjusted upstream.

accounting_metadata.partial_reason: Reported diesel may include renewable or biogenic blend share, but this activity currently treats the entered volume as fully fossil.

label: Stationary Propane
description: Combustion of propane in stationary equipment.

fields.label: Propane Consumption
fields.help_text: Enter propane consumption for stationary equipment.

fields.label: Emission Factor Override
fields.help_text: Optional fuel carbon-intensity or supplier-specific factor. If provided, this replaces the default combustion factor.

fields.label: Override Factor Source
fields.help_text: Capture the supplier, certificate, utility, or analysis supporting the override factor.

label: Purchased District Steam
description: Purchased district steam for facility operations.

fields.label: Purchased Steam
fields.help_text: Enter purchased steam consumed during the reporting period.

notes: Current implementation uses delivered steam CO2e factors; gas-level factor detail is not yet available.

accounting_metadata.partial_reason: Purchased steam currently uses delivered steam factors and may not preserve full gas-level detail for all providers.

label: Purchased District Steam - Renewable Claim
description: Purchased district steam associated with renewable or lower-carbon claim logic requiring explicit accounting review.

fields.label: Purchased Steam
fields.help_text: Enter purchased steam associated with renewable or low-carbon attributes.

fields.label: Claim Basis
fields.help_text: Capture the contractual or supplier-specific basis for a renewable steam claim.

label: Owned Vehicle Gasoline
description: Combustion of gasoline in owned or controlled vehicles.

fields.label: Gasoline Consumption
fields.help_text: Enter gasoline consumed by owned or controlled vehicles.

label: Owned Vehicle Ethanol (E100)
description: Combustion of ethanol in owned or controlled vehicles with separate biogenic treatment where required.

fields.label: Ethanol Consumption
fields.help_text: Enter ethanol consumed by owned or controlled vehicles.

notes: Biogenic emissions should remain separately identifiable.

label: Owned Vehicle Diesel
description: Combustion of diesel in owned or controlled vehicles.

fields.label: Diesel Consumption
fields.help_text: Enter diesel consumed by owned or controlled vehicles.

notes: Reported diesel may include renewable or biogenic blend share; current calculation treats entered volume as fully fossil unless adjusted upstream.

accounting_metadata.partial_reason: Reported diesel may include renewable or biogenic blend share, but this activity currently treats the entered volume as fully fossil.

label: Owned Vehicle Biodiesel (B100)
description: Combustion of biodiesel in owned or controlled vehicles with separate biogenic handling.

fields.label: Biodiesel Consumption
fields.help_text: Enter biodiesel consumed by owned or controlled vehicles.

notes: Biogenic emissions should remain separately identifiable.

label: Owned Vehicle Renewable Diesel
description: Combustion of renewable diesel in owned or controlled vehicles with separate biogenic treatment where required.

fields.label: Renewable Diesel Consumption
fields.help_text: Enter renewable diesel consumed by owned or controlled vehicles.

notes: Biogenic emissions should remain separately identifiable if applicable.

label: Owned Electric Vehicle Charging
description: Electricity used to charge owned or controlled electric vehicles, reported under Scope 2.

fields.label: Charging Electricity
fields.help_text: Enter electricity used for EV charging.

notes: Workbook source unit appeared inconsistent; canonical model uses electricity units.

label: Owned Vehicle CNG
description: Combustion of compressed natural gas in owned or controlled vehicles.

fields.label: CNG Consumption
fields.help_text: Enter compressed natural gas consumed by owned or controlled vehicles.

label: Owned Vehicle LNG
description: Combustion of liquefied natural gas in owned or controlled vehicles.

fields.label: LNG Consumption
fields.help_text: Enter liquefied natural gas consumed by owned or controlled vehicles.

label: Owned Vehicle Propane
description: Combustion of propane in owned or controlled vehicles.

fields.label: Propane Consumption
fields.help_text: Enter propane consumed by owned or controlled vehicles.

label: Contracted Truck Freight
description: Third-party freight movement by truck, typically reported in Scope 3 category 4.

fields.label: Freight Activity
fields.help_text: Enter freight movement in ton-miles.

label: Contracted Rail Freight
description: Third-party freight movement by rail, typically reported in Scope 3 category 4.

fields.label: Freight Activity
fields.help_text: Enter freight movement in ton-miles.

label: Contracted Ocean Freight
description: Third-party freight movement by waterborne craft, typically reported in Scope 3 category 4.

fields.label: Freight Activity
fields.help_text: Enter freight movement in ton-miles.

label: Contracted Air Freight
description: Third-party freight movement by air, typically reported in Scope 3 category 4.

fields.label: Freight Activity
fields.help_text: Enter freight movement in ton-miles.

label: Other Contracted Freight Fuel
description: Fuel-based upstream freight activity where mode-specific treatment is not yet formally modeled.

fields.label: Fuel Consumption
fields.help_text: Enter fuel consumption where mode-specific freight factors are not available.

notes: Deferred until a defensible factor and classification strategy is defined.

label: Business Travel - Rental Vehicle
description: Business travel by rental vehicle, typically modeled from distance plus fuel efficiency or fuel consumption.

fields.label: Vehicle Miles
fields.help_text: Enter total business-travel vehicle miles.

fields.label: Fuel Efficiency (MPG)
fields.help_text: Use actual or defensible default MPG.

fields.label: Fuel Type
fields.help_text: Defaults to gasoline if not specified.

notes: Current implementation supports the distance-plus-efficiency pathway with gasoline and diesel fuel selection.

label: Business Travel - Employee-Owned Vehicle
description: Business travel in employee-owned personal vehicles, modeled from distance plus fuel efficiency or fuel consumption.

fields.label: Vehicle Miles
fields.help_text: Enter total business-travel miles in employee-owned vehicles.

fields.label: Fuel Efficiency (MPG)
fields.help_text: Use actual or defensible default MPG.

fields.label: Fuel Type
fields.help_text: Defaults to gasoline if not specified.

label: Business Travel - Commercial Air
description: Business air travel, typically reported in Scope 3 category 6.

fields.label: Passenger Miles
fields.help_text: Enter passenger miles for business air travel.

label: Employee Commuting - Bus
description: Employee commuting by bus, typically reported in Scope 3 category 7.

fields.label: Passenger Miles
fields.help_text: Enter passenger miles for employee bus commuting.

label: Business Travel - Intercity Rail
description: Business travel by intercity rail, typically reported in Scope 3 category 6.

fields.label: Passenger Miles
fields.help_text: Enter passenger miles for business intercity rail travel.

label: Employee Commuting - Transit Rail
description: Employee commuting by transit rail, typically reported in Scope 3 category 7.

fields.label: Passenger Miles
fields.help_text: Enter passenger miles for employee transit rail commuting.

label: Fugitive Refrigerant Release
description: Release of refrigerant mass under Scope 1, converted to CO2e using refrigerant-specific GWP values.

fields.label: Mass Released
fields.help_text: Enter mass of refrigerant released.

fields.label: Refrigerant Type
fields.help_text: Select a canonical refrigerant identifier. Only refrigerants with a supported AR6 GWP factor are listed.

notes: A generic repeatable activity type is preferable to fixed numbered refrigerant rows.

accounting_metadata.partial_reason: Refrigerant releases currently support AR6 GWP factors only.

label: Waste Generated in Operations
description: Waste generated in operations, reported in Scope 3 category 5 with disposal-path-specific treatment.

fields.label: Waste Mass
fields.help_text: Enter waste generated in operations.

fields.label: Disposal Method
fields.help_text: Choose the treatment path because waste emissions vary materially by disposal method.
